title: Nageshvara Jyotirlinga
tagline: Nageshvara Jyotirlinga — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Nageshwar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located on Dwarka, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Nageshwar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located on Dwarka, Gujarat, India. It is one of the legendary temples mentioned in the Shiva Purana and one of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

topPlaces.name: Rajpara State (Halar)
topPlaces.description: Rajpara (originally Rajpura) is a village and former Hindu non-salute Rajput princely state (native state) on Saurashtra peninsula in Gujarat, western India.

topPlaces.name: Magderu
topPlaces.description: Magderu is an 8th-century temple of Maitraka period located near Dhrasanvel village in Okhamandal Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India. The temple is located three miles northeast of Dwarka.

items.note: Rajpara (originally Rajpura) is a village and former Hindu non-salute Rajput princely state (native state) on Saurashtra peninsula in Gujarat, western India.

Magderu is an 8th-century temple of Maitraka period located near Dhrasanvel village in Okhamandal Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India. The temple is located three miles northeast of Dwarka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nageshvara Jyotirlinga?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nageshvara Jyotirlinga is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nageshvara Jyotirlinga?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (175 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nageshvara Jyotirlinga?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nageshvara Jyotirlinga at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nageshvara Jyotirlinga?
faq.a: Stays in Nageshvara Jyotirlinga start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nageshvara Jyotirlinga?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajpara State (Halar), Magderu.
